series_metadata.Series_title: BDE-47 Transcriptomic Alterations in Human Primary Villous Cytrophoblasts
series_metadata.Series_summary: Transcriptomic characterization of BDE-47 exposed cultured primary human cytrophoblasts (2nd trimester) undergoing differentiation in vitro.
series_metadata.Series_overall_design: Transcriptome of human villous cytotrophoblasts exposed to BDE-47 or vehicle for 24h.

paired_model_summary.interpretation: Exact paired sign-flip test on BDE-47 minus vehicle donor deltas
